MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Trustee.

Mr. Siracusa requested a four week continuance stating that four parcels of unimproved property sold, that they had not received the proceeds and that the funds are now with the title company. Status on filing of the fifth account is continued to December 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
